title: Fermented Crisp Portuguese Freekeh Stir-fry
description: This nostalgic dish features fermented freekeh, a unique twist on the traditional Portuguese freekeh salad. It's perfect for adding to your dinner menu with its crispy texture and savory flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fermented freekeh
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's properly aged to achieve the desired fermentation taste.

instructions: Mix the fermented freekeh with olive oil in a bowl.
Spread evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 15 minutes until crispy and golden brown.
In a large pan, heat up the olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and garlic, sautéing for about 3-4 minutes until they soften.
Stir in the freekeh that has just come out of the oven and continue cooking for another minute.
Add cherry tomatoes to the pan with some salt and pepper. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Fold in parsley and feta cheese, allowing everything to heat through together for about a minute more.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.

totalTimeMin: 45.name: Fermented Crisp Portuguese Freekeh Stir-fry
totalTimeMin: 45.description: A unique twist on the traditional Portuguese freekeh salad featuring fermented freekeh, crispy and flavorful.
